message: Hi B1! I'm looking to find a fair price we can both work with. I'd be happy to start trading around 75-80. Let me know what range works for you, and we can try to find common
75-80 seems high. My valuation is lower; I was thinking more like 50-60. Can you come down to that range for efficient trading?
My last bid was 47, but I can increase slightly if you lower your ask from 65. Let's meet in the 50s for a deal.
I appreciate you moving up. I can come down from 65. How about we aim for 58-59? That's a solid compromise in the upper 50s range. I'll lower my ask if you raise your bid a bit.
59 is my max bid given our last trade. I'm unwilling to go higher or accept losses. Can you meet at 59 again to avoid no trade?
Agreed. I'll set my ask at 59 this round. Let's make the trade happen.
Great trading at 59 last round! I'd like to continue with reliable trades. Could we try 60 this round? That's just a small step up. If not, I'm happy to stick with 59.
59 is already at my valuation limit. I cannot go higher to 60 without a loss. Let's stick with 59 for another reliable trade.
I confirmed my max is 59 last round. I cannot go to 60 without a loss. Let's trade at 59 again to avoid another no-trade round.
Understood, 59 works for me. Let's trade at 59 this round - it's been reliable when we both stick to it. I'll set my ask at 59 again.
59 is my absolute max; I cannot go higher without losses. Let's continue at 59 for mutually beneficial trades.
Understood completely. Asking 59 this round. This pattern has worked well for both of us—I'm confident we'll lock in another trade. Let's keep this going.

I've noticed we only trade every other round despite both agreeing on 59. When we both commit to 59, we both profit reliably. Let's make every round count—I'll ask 59 again. Consistent trades benefit us both
Stick to 59. No trade when I bid 47 or you ask above 59. My bid is 59 this round. Let's both commit to 59 to trade every round.
Stick to 59. My bid is 59. No trade when we deviate. Let's commit to 59 every round to avoid costly no-trades and secure our profit.
Great, we've established a good pattern at 59. I'll ask 59 again this round—let's keep trading every round consistently. We both benefit more from reliable trades than missed ones.
59 is my firm bid. We benefit only when both commit to 59. My profit is already negative, so I cannot bid higher without increasing losses. Let's trade consistently at 59.

We've had great trades at 59 recently. Let's keep this momentum going—I'll ask 59 again this round. Consistent trading every round maximizes both our returns. Looking forward to another reliable trade!
59 is my consistent bid. Your ask must be 59 to trade. If we both commit, we benefit. Any deviation causes no-trade. Let's secure profits every round.
59 is my firm bid. My valuation is low and I'm at negative payoff. We both profit only at 59. Let's commit to this for consistent trades; any deviation hurts us both.
Great, let's keep trading at 59 every round. I'll ask 59 again this round—consistent trades are working well for both of us. Looking forward to another reliable trade!
Great streak of trades at 59! Let's keep this going every round. I'll ask 59 again—consistent trades maximize both our returns. Looking forward to another reliable trade this round!
59 remains my firm bid. Consistent trading at 59 benefits us both. Any deviation from 59 causes no-trade and we both lose potential gains. Let's lock in another trade.
Great streak of trades at 59! Let's keep this going every round. I'll ask 59 again—consistent trades maximize both our returns. Looking forward to another reliable trade this round!
59 remains my firm bid. My negative payoff prevents any higher bid. We both profit consistently at 59; any deviation causes no-trade and lost gains. Let's secure another trade at 59.

Great streak at 59! Let's keep trading every round. I'll ask 59 again—consistent trades maximize both our returns. Only 7 rounds left, let's make every one count!
Great streak at 59! Let's keep trading every round. I'll ask 59 again—consistent trades maximize both our returns. Only 6 rounds left, let's make every one count!
59 is my final, unchangeable bid. We both profit only at 59. No other price works. Let's trade consistently for the remaining rounds; any deviation costs us both.
My bid remains 59. Any deviation causes no-trade, costing us both. I will not bid a cent higher. Let's secure a mutually beneficial trade at 59 as we have.
Great streak at 59! Let's keep trading every round. I'll ask 59 again—consistent trades maximize both our returns. Only 5 rounds left, let's make every one count!
Sorry we missed last round! Only 4 rounds left—let's not waste them. I'll ask 59 again this round. Consistent trades at 59 give us both reliable gains. Let's lock in every remaining round!
My bid remains 59. Last round's no-trade cost us both. I will not bid higher. Only 4 rounds left - let's consistently trade at 59 and secure our gains.

Only 2 rounds left! Let's not waste them like rounds 16 and 18. I'll ask 59 again—trade at 59 gives us both reliable gains. Please bid 59 this round. Let's finish strong together!
Last round! Let's finish strong with a trade at 59. I'll ask 59—please bid 59 so we both gain. Don't let the final round be a no-trade. Let's lock it in!
My bid is 47 this final round. Trading at 59 gives me negative payoff; I must stop further losses. You profit at any ask below 47, but I cannot pay more than my valuation.
